title: Researchers Say Ancient Egypt Did Not Build Booby-Trapped Pyramids, Here’s What Really Kept Intruders Away
description: What if the most famous feature of pyramid defenses never actually existed? the methods that were truly used reveal a much more calculated approach to protecting the tombs.

title: Rajasthan Guv urges students to connect with India’s ancient knowledge traditions
description: Jaipur, Mar 28 (PTI) Rajasthan Governor Haribhau Bagde on Saturday urged students to connect with India’s ancient knowledge traditions and contribute towards nation-building. title: In an Ancient Italian Town, This 592-Square-Foot Home is Spread Across Six Levels
